# NovaCore Global FZE — Full Company Profile

NovaCore Global FZE is the export and commercial division of an ISO-certified lubricant
manufacturer based in Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates. Manufacturing, quality systems
and ISO certificates belong to the group factory, Lubcon Oil Based Lubricanting Manufacturing
L.L.C. NovaCore Global FZE handles export, distribution partnerships and private-label programs.
This relationship is stated openly; certificates carry the manufacturing entity's name and numbers.

## Frequently asked questions

### Who is NovaCore Global FZE?
The export and commercial division of an ISO-certified lubricant manufacturer in Ras Al Khaimah,
UAE. It supplies distributors, fleet operators, industrial buyers and brand owners worldwide.

### What does the company manufacture?
Motor oils, diesel engine oils, transmission and gear oils (including ATF), industrial and
hydraulic oils, marine lubricants, greases, coolants, brake fluids and base oils. Products are
formulated to international API, ACEA and OEM specifications and packed from 700 ml to bulk.

### Where is it located?
Al Hamra Industrial Zone Free Zone (NFZ), Ras Al Khaimah, United Arab Emirates (WIZN5-10, Shed N5).

### Which countries and regions does it supply?
GCC and the Middle East, Europe, Russia and the CIS, Africa, Latin America and Asia.

### What certifications does it hold?
The group manufacturing entity holds ISO 9001:2015 (Quality, Cert No. LUB/QMS/L25/5484),
ISO 14001:2015 (Environmental, Cert No. LUB/EMS/L25/2238) and ISO 45001:2018 (Health & Safety,
Cert No. LUB/OHS/L25/3613), all valid until 17.12.2028. Accredited by the United Accreditation
Foundation (UAF), an IAF member, and verifiable at saaracertification.com.

### Can it produce private-label or white-label lubricants?
Yes. The full process — specification, formulation, blending, filling, label and packaging design,
and export documentation — is handled by a single ISO-certified UAE partner.

### How do distributors get in touch?
Contact Sazonov Kliment by phone or WhatsApp at +971 56 333 3025 (wa.me/971563333025),
on Telegram at t.me/beretta_chin, or via the quote form on the website. Replies are typically
within one business day from Ras Al Khaimah.

## Languages
English, Arabic, Russian, Spanish, Portuguese.
